narrative:
Goshen Township G (precinct in Clermont County) has 887 registered voters, with 66.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.1 percentage points.
